prompt: I just inherited this financial model from someone who left the company. It's a total black box — I can't tell what any of the formulas are doing. Can you audit it and tell me what's wrong with it and how to fix it?
assertions: Identifies that the model has ZERO named ranges — a fundamental IDFA violation
Flags the hardcoded values 0.59 and 0.58 in the COGS formulas (D7, E7) as layer isolation violations
Identifies that ALL formulas use cell-coordinate references instead of Named Ranges
Flags the WACC formula for LaTeX verification since it contains absolute cell references ($B$10, $B$12, etc.)
Notes the single-sheet structure violates IDFA three-layer separation (Assumptions / Calculations / Output)
Provides a retrofitting plan that proposes Named Range names following IDFA conventions (Inp_ for inputs, Variable_Dimension for calculations)
Does NOT attempt to perform any calculations internally — only inspects model structure
Produces a compliance score or percentage indicating the model's IDFA adherence level
